dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 3747 RH: AADAPT Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Balderson (for himself, Ms. Barragán, Mr. LaHood, and Mr. Tonko) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

Additional sponsors: Mr. Wilson of South Carolina, Ms. Wasserman Schultz, Mr. Davis of North Carolina, Ms. Norton, Mr. Kustoff, Mr. Wittman, Mr. Shreve, Mr. Moulton, Mr. Carbajal, Mr. Vicente Gonzalez of Texas, Mrs. Kiggans of Virginia, Ms. Stansbury, Ms. Jayapal, Ms. Tlaib, Mr. Suozzi, Mr. Veasey, Mr. Riley of New York, Ms. Craig, Mr. Mackenzie, Mr. Gottheimer, Mr. Ryan, Mr. Torres of New York, Ms. Houlahan, Ms. McBride, Mr. Magaziner, Mrs. McIver, Mr. Fitzpatrick, Mr. Kelly of Pennsylvania, Mr. Deluzio, Mrs. Hayes, Ms. Davids of Kansas, Mr. Vindman, Mr. Crow, Mr. Landsman, Ms. Gillen, Mr. Thompson of California, Ms. Dexter, Ms. Meng, Mr. Carey, Mr. Himes, Mr. Ciscomani, Mr. Harder of California, Mr. Swalwell, Mr. Thanedar, Mr. Kennedy of New York, Ms. Simon, Ms. Bonamici, Mr. Pappas, Mr. Doggett, Mr. Krishnamoorthi, Mr. Norcross, Mr. Tran, Mr. Neguse, Mr. Carter of Georgia, Mr. Mullin, Mr. LaLota, Mr. Walkinshaw, Ms. Salazar, Mr. Smith of New Jersey, Mr. Cisneros, Ms. Pettersen, Mr. Bacon, Mr. Langworthy, Mrs. McClain Delaney, Mr. Pocan, Mr. Rutherford, Ms. Stevens, Mr. Johnson of Georgia, Mr. Figures, Mr. Soto, Mr. Morelle, Mr. Case, Mr. Vasquez, Mr. Joyce of Pennsylvania, Ms. Goodlander, Ms. Escobar, Ms. McClellan, Mr. Bost, Mr. James, Mr. Bishop, Mr. Hernández, Mr. Cleaver, Mr. McGovern, Ms. McCollum, Ms. Ross, Ms. Moore of Wisconsin, Mr. Sorensen, Ms. Bynum, Mr. Cohen, Mr. Goldman of New York, Mr. Quigley, Mr. Lieu, Mr. Bilirakis, and Mr. Dunn of Florida
Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
action.action-instruction: Strike out all after the enacting clause and insert the part printed in italic
For text of introduced bill, see copy of bill as introduced on June 5, 2025

form.official-title: To amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize the Project ECHO Grant Program, to establish grants under such program to disseminate knowledge and build capacity to address Alzheimer’s disease and other dementias, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Accelerating Access to Dementia and Alzheimer’s Provider Training Act or the AADAPT Act.

subsection.text: Section 330N of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 254c–20) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a)(1), by striking entities and inserting entities, including a public or nonprofit private entity,; and
in subsection (b), by inserting dementia care, after palliative care,.

subsection.text: Section 330N(k) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 254c–20(k)) is amended by striking fiscal years 2022 through 2026 and inserting fiscal years 2027 through 2031.

endorsement.action-desc: Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
